prompt: A man standing in the middle of a vast, noisy train station crowd, eyes closed, head tilted, expression of intense hyper-focused concentration. He is listening to one specific person — a woman directly in front of him speaking closely — while all around him dozens of other people are clearly trying to speak to him, mouths open, arms reaching, expressions desperate. He hears nothing but her. His face shows perfect calm for her words, total obliviousness to everyone else. Shallow depth of field — the one woman is sharp, the crowd behind is blurred and chaotic. Cinematic, photorealistic, dramatic natural lighting. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no floating elements. --no charts, no graphs, no equations, no text
metaphor: A man in a crowd hears only one voice — one input receives all focus while others are suppressed, mirroring selective attention weighting.
